original_title: SHKD-907 This Creepy Middle-Aged Dirty Old Man Moved In Next To A College Girl And Put Her In Confinement In His Room And Turned Her Into One Of His Sex Toys Amy Fukada - Eimi Fukada
overview: "It's'Eimi'who came next to me. Thank you for your cooperation." I felt that the time had stopped. I was fascinated by her at a glance when she appeared in front of me. There is no point in living ... My life I thought so. I found a reason to live. I want to have sex with her ... I want to have sex ... I want to have sex ... Yes, I should confine myself in my room ... Wait,'Eimi'-chan.
